def positive_concatenation_in_comprehension_body():
    rule_id = "concatenation_in_comprehension_body"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "String or collection concatenation happens inside a comprehension body, creating avoidable churn."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
